items.text: Window up/down is possible while operating the power window switch at one level.
Can be activated in ignition ON mode and during key OFF operation (driver's seat only).
When the power window switch is operated in two positions, auto up/down of the window is possible.
Can be activated in ignition ON mode and during key OFF operation.

blocks.text: If an obstruction is detected during the auto up operation of the window, the window stops and reverses about 70 mm to stop. If the windshield opening position has not reached approximately 220 mm, the window will reverse to approximately 220 mm. In addition, even during the manual up operation, the pinching detection control is performed during the key OFF operation. Pinching is detected by changes in the pulse cycle of the power window motor.
